subcodes.first_line: During the time that His Holiness the Exalted One lived in Bushihr and was in the trading business, a few merchants bought some Prussian blue dye from His blessed Person
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab
